overall.description: Dark nighttime footage from a video game showing first-person exploration of a flooded urban environment with erupting water geysers. The player navigates through wet streets and increasingly dark building corridors using ambient light sources, creating a tense atmospheric experience.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban plaza with erupting geysers

events.description: large water geyser becomes visible in the distance, erupting from flooded ground
camera approaches and begins to pass the main water geyser

agents.ego_description: cautiously walking through flooded ruins toward erupting water geysers, scanning the dark environment

entered.detail: tall column of water erupting vertically from the flooded ground, illuminated by ambient light
damaged concrete structures and debris scattered in the flooded area
large dark tree trunk or wooden structure partially submerged in water
shallow water covering the entire ground surface with reflective wet patches

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dark, flooded urban plaza at night. The camera approaches a prominent water geyser erupting from the submerged ground, passing concrete ruins and a large tree trunk on the right. The environment is desolate and empty, with only the sound of water and the geyser visible in the low light.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded commercial street with building lights

events.description: passes the water geyser and enters a more built-up urban street area
ambient light from distant buildings and street lights becomes more prominent

agents.ego_description: navigating through the flooded street, moving past the geyser toward lit buildings in the distance

entered.detail: multi-story commercial buildings with illuminated windows lining the flooded street
warm yellow artificial lights mounted on poles or building facades
submerged road surface reflecting the ambient lights from surrounding structures

segments.scene_description: Having passed the geyser, the scene transitions to a flooded commercial street. Urban buildings with illuminated windows line the right side, casting reflections on the water-covered road. The camera moves steadily forward through the empty street, leaving the geyser behind as artificial lighting becomes the primary light source.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban intersection with overhead lighting

events.description: passes under overhead street lights creating pools of illumination on the wet ground
approaching a darker building entrance or covered area at the end of the street

agents.ego_description: walking through the flooded intersection toward a darker building entrance, passing under street lights

notable_agents.action: abandoned vehicle partially submerged in flood water near the building

entered.detail: fluorescent or LED light fixtures mounted on building overhangs illuminating the street below
storefronts and commercial facades with dark windows and architectural details

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a flooded urban intersection illuminated by overhead artificial lights. Commercial buildings line the street, and an abandoned vehicle sits partially submerged on the right. The segment ends as the camera approaches a darker building entrance, transitioning from the open street toward an enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark covered walkway or building corridor

events.description: enters a dark enclosed corridor or covered walkway with minimal lighting
passes dim wall-mounted lights creating narrow pools of visibility in the darkness

agents.ego_description: cautiously moving through the dark corridor, visibility limited to small pools of light from wall fixtures

entered.detail: enclosed pedestrian corridor or building interior with roof overhead and walls on both sides
dim fluorescent fixtures mounted on the left wall providing minimal illumination
smooth dark concrete or plaster wall surface of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a narrow, dark covered walkway or building corridor. The flooded street and open urban environment are left behind as the camera enters an enclosed space with only dim wall-mounted lights providing minimal visibility. The concrete walls and ceiling create a claustrophobic atmosphere as the camera continues forward into the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a flooded urban wasteland that transitions from an open, desolate plaza into a claustrophobic interior corridor. It begins in a dark, submerged plaza, moving past concrete ruins and a large tree trunk toward a powerful water geyser erupting from the ground. As the camera passes the geyser, the scene shifts into a flooded commercial street where the low light is replaced by the glow of illuminated windows reflecting off the water-covered road. The movement continues through an intersection lit by overhead artificial lights, passing a partially submerged abandoned vehicle before turning toward a dark building entrance. Finally, the open urban environment vanishes as the camera enters a narrow covered walkway, where dim wall-mounted lights cast minimal visibility against concrete walls in a deepening darkness.
